title: 抒情桥

evidence.canonical:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • 75 Lyroic Bridge is awarded upon completion of The Old Peace quest.

• Awarded from The Perita Rebellion 's Recall: Hunhullus :
 • Every Order completed in the Recall: Hunhullus awards 1 Lyroic Bridge.

• Defeating the Hunhullus awards 10 Lyroic Bridge.

• In The Steel Path , defeating Commandeered Warframes (outside of the Prime Vanguard fight) may drop 2 Lyroic Bridge, regardless of the Recall mission.

• Not affected by Resource booster.

• Can be bought from Marie Leroux in La Cathédrale , Sanctum Anatomica , in quantities of 15 in exchange for Agnovidisc , Laudavi , and/or Servoris . These purchases are limited to one per day, and are on a rotating basis.

• Can be bought from the Market as part of the Tektolyst Artifact Acquisition Pack , in quantities of 150 for 175 Platinum 175 . This bundle can only be purchased once.

• 10 Lyroic Bridge can be obtained from the mission " The Guilty " ( Hardmode Boss ) in The Perita Rebellion , as a repeated mission clearing reward.

methods.sourceDisplayName: 佩里塔叛乱：回忆·英魂统使
